globalNews.title: At least 90 killed in Chinese coal mine explosion, state media reports
globalNews.summary: The blast in Shanxi province constitutes the country's worst mining disaster in 16 years.

globalNews.title: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
globalNews.summary: Ukraine says it struck Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied region.

globalNews.title: French mum and partner held until trial after sons abandoned by road in Portugal
globalNews.summary: The couple, who allegedly left the woman's sons on a roadside in southern Portugal, will remain in custody.

globalNews.title: Rubio meets Modi during India visit with energy high on agenda
globalNews.summary: The secretary of state wants to sell US energy to Delhi to make up for shortfalls caused by the Iran war.

globalNews.title: SpaceX launches massive Starship V3 rocket on test flight
globalNews.summary: The largest and most powerful rocket in history blasted off after its first attempted launch was postponed.

cryptoNews.title: Binance denies new WSJ report alleging $850M in Iran-linked transactions
cryptoNews.summary: Binance CEO Richard Teng denied a new WSJ report alleging $850 million in Iran-linked transactions flowed through the exchange to the IRGC.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: ECB pushes back on euro stablecoin proposals, citing financial stability risks
cryptoNews.summary: The ECB warned EU finance ministers that expanding euro stablecoin issuance could weaken bank lending and complicate monetary policy.

cryptoNews.title: SEC approves Nasdaq to list Bitcoin index options on the exchange
cryptoNews.summary: The cash-settled, European-style contracts will trade under the ticker QBTC on Phlx, but still require CFTC approval before trading can begin.

cryptoNews.title: $1.26B Bitcoin ETF outflows spark ‘contrarian’ buy signal: Santiment
cryptoNews.summary: Ongoing Bitcoin ETF outflows have historically “correlated with conditions favorable for patient accumulation rather than panic," according to Santiment.

aiNews.title: Elon Musk has given up on solar power (on Earth)
aiNews.summary: Elon Muks's xAI has gone all in on natural gas, while SpaceX is obsessed with orbital data centers. What happened to the "solar-electric economy" he promised?

aiNews.title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
aiNews.summary: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.

aiNews.title: Google goes for the glitter with disco-ball icons: ‘Are y’all sure you still want this?’
aiNews.summary: You can now disco ball-ify your entire Pixel home screen, says Google.

aiNews.title: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
aiNews.summary: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when talking about progress publicly. And their investors are fully aware.

aiNews.title: Elon Musk can’t hear you over the sound of his $1.75 trillion IPO
aiNews.summary: The SpaceX S-1 is finally here, and the story it tells goes way further than rockets. The filing runs to 36 pages of risk factors alone, and the numbers inside match the ambition: a $28 trillion total
